en.description_en: A sculpture (chōkoku) within the tangible cultural property category, a wooden standing image of the Amida Buddha. Town-designated in Naraha Town on 1974-09-20. Located at 58 Aza Nishidai, Ōya (Hokyo-ji Temple).
